name: React JS
description: Full Stack software development using React and modern web technologies.

name: Fundamentals of Computer Science
description: An introduction to computer science covering problem solving, algorithms, and basic programming concepts.

name: Discrete Structures
description: Mathematical foundations of computer science including logic, sets, proofs, and combinatorics.

description: Design and analysis of algorithms with an emphasis on data structures and problem-solving techniques.

description: Practical software engineering concepts including design, testing, teamwork, and real-world development practices.

name: Theory of Computation
description: Study of computational models, formal languages, automata, and the limits of computation.
